title: Actually 3D Workbenches
description: A Vanilla friendly resourcepack, which makes Workbenches in Minecraft more detailed, smoother and actually 3D! (3D Crafting Table, 3D Crafter, 3D Fletching Table, 3D Stonecutter, 3D Loom, 3D Barrel, 3D tables, etc.)
body:
![The logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efc9c439890e2458a49c79a6a987ffd640c3292b.png)
____ ##
This is a standalone Workbench pack of
###
____ ###
**More details:**
Each of the Workbenches (Crafting Table, Crafter, Smithing Table, etc.) has an actually 3D model, that's really detailed and uses the vanilla textures to be really vanilla friendly!
‎ *** ##
**The 3D Workbench Showcase:**
| 3D Crafting Table | 3D Crafter | 3D Cartography Table | |:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:-------------------------:| |![The crafting table model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9af0a54a9852e2a24e5ba77c571910cac952f0d.png)|![The Crafter model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0e87e1c204a04d087681f9f06cde0333cb64f66.png)|![The NEW Cartography Table model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd3f50d6ded5eb9615e988b5a68cbd2a24fec77d.png)| |**3D Fletching Table**|**3D Smithing Table**|**3D Stonecutter**| |![The Fletching Table model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0667036195a9ac0264ee5edc3986f20855a1562.png)|![The smithing table model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41200b80914a606548ee6366574d9b82378d7bd3.png)|![The stonecutter model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b1b006f441a355a188e68496c65fcf22fc5397.gif)| | **3D Enchantment Table** | **3D Loom** | **3D Barrel** | |![The Enchantment Table model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ae576523c7f806bbb900df383f83796de7a3251_0.webp)|![The Loom model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/184707324df55cfbdf155cd47c491b932c9816f2.png)|![The Barrel model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a1d5c4f9fcb824bd035a03207bccea273bcc993.gif)| |**3D Lectern**|**3D Brewing Stand**| |![The Lectern model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/656bbe044ab0aceafd60c4a15304ad8709bd925a_0.webp)|![The Brewing Stand model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6caf42f309915c0658ff89d22d6de05735a1173b.png)| ###

‎ ‎ ____ ____
The Future Plans: This is the second pack of my 'Actually 3D' resourcepack collection, which will hopefully expand, adding new & detailed 3D models to existing blocks, and even items in the game! I'm planning to release each sub-pack (like: Furnaces, Workbenches, Ores, etc.) on it's own, while also adding it to the main 'Actually 3D' pack which will feature all my 'Actually 3D' resourepacks in one.
